::: {.content-visible unless-format="pdf"}

```{=html}
<figure class="visual-card" aria-labelledby="agent-loop-title">
<span class="visual-kicker" id="agent-loop-title">Схема · агентский цикл</span>
<svg viewBox="0 0 720 320" role="img" aria-label="LLM планирует, через ваш код вызывает инструмент, получает наблюдение и повторяет цикл до финального ответа">
      <defs>
        <marker id="arrow-accent-3" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8.5" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
          <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="var(--accent)" />
        </marker>
        <marker id="arrow-green-3" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8.5" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
          <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="var(--green)" />
        </marker>
      </defs>

      <rect class="svg-box surface" x="34" y="86" width="146" height="80" rx="14" />
      <text class="svg-label" x="107" y="120" text-anchor="middle">запрос</text>
      <text class="svg-small" x="107" y="142" text-anchor="middle">цель задачи</text>

      <path class="svg-arrow" d="M 186 126 H 282" marker-end="url(#arrow-accent-3)" />

      <rect class="svg-box accent" x="288" y="72" width="156" height="108" rx="20" />
      <circle class="svg-dot" cx="340" cy="102" r="5.5" />
      <circle class="svg-dot yellow" cx="366" cy="102" r="5.5" />
      <circle class="svg-dot green" cx="392" cy="102" r="5.5" />
      <text class="svg-label" x="366" y="140" text-anchor="middle">LLM</text>
      <text class="svg-small" x="366" y="164" text-anchor="middle">планирует шаги</text>

      <path class="svg-arrow" d="M 444 104 C 478 70 522 70 556 104" marker-end="url(#arrow-accent-3)" />
      <text class="svg-mono" x="500" y="56" text-anchor="middle">tool_call</text>

      <rect class="svg-box yellow" x="556" y="86" width="140" height="80" rx="14" />
      <text class="svg-label" x="626" y="120" text-anchor="middle">ваш код</text>
      <text class="svg-small" x="626" y="142" text-anchor="middle">исполняет tool</text>

      <path class="svg-arrow green" d="M 556 150 C 522 186 478 186 444 150" marker-end="url(#arrow-green-3)" />
      <text class="svg-mono" x="500" y="214" text-anchor="middle">observation</text>

      <rect x="456" y="111" width="88" height="32" rx="16" fill="var(--surface)" stroke="var(--rule)" stroke-width="1.4" />
      <text class="svg-mono" x="500" y="131" text-anchor="middle" style="fill:var(--accent)">loop</text>

      <path class="svg-arrow green" d="M 366 180 V 240" marker-end="url(#arrow-green-3)" />
      <rect class="svg-box green" x="288" y="240" width="156" height="58" rx="14" />
      <text class="svg-label" x="366" y="268" text-anchor="middle">финальный ответ</text>
      <text class="svg-mono" x="366" y="288" text-anchor="middle">tool_calls пуст</text>
    </svg>
</figure>
```

:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
![Схема · агентский цикл](_diagrams/agent-loop.svg){width=100%}
:::
